title: CEIC Data — Iran Registered Motor Vehicles (free-preview figures only)
source_org: CEIC Data (original series attributed by CEIC to OICA — International Organization of Motor Vehicle Manufacturers)
time_coverage: 2005-2020 (12 yearly observations per CEIC free-preview summary; page title claims through 2025 but only figures through 2020 are visible without a subscription)
license_terms: CEIC proprietary data platform — only the free-preview summary text is captured here; bulk/full time series requires a paid CEIC subscription and was NOT accessed or downloaded
notes: This is a hand-written markdown note transcribing exactly what CEIC's public free-preview page displays (summary stats: latest value, previous value, all-time high/low, average). No bulk CSV/API data was obtained — CEIC's underlying time series is paywalled. Quoted text is verbatim from the page as fetched via browser on 2026-07-12.
